name: erpnext
title: ERPNext
description: Full-featured ERP covering accounting, inventory, manufacturing, CRM, HR, and more.

name: hrms
title: HRMS
description: Modern HR and payroll management with leave, attendance, expense claims, and appraisals.

name: crm
title: CRM
description: Sales CRM with leads, deals, pipeline views, email sequences, and call management.

name: helpdesk
title: Helpdesk
description: Customer support and ticket management with SLAs, canned replies, and a customer portal.

name: wiki
title: Wiki
description: Knowledge base and documentation tool with versioning, search, and a clean reading experience.

name: drive
title: Drive
description: Open source file storage and sharing — upload, organise, and collaborate on documents.

name: builder
title: Builder
description: No-code website builder with drag-and-drop blocks, components, and live preview.

name: lms
title: LMS
description: Learning management system with courses, quizzes, certificates, and progress tracking.

name: payments
title: Payments
description: Payment gateway integrations for Stripe, Razorpay, PayPal, Braintree, and more.

name: health
title: Health
description: Healthcare management with patient records, appointments, lab results, and billing.

name: gameplan
title: Gameplan
description: Team collaboration with discussions, projects, to-dos, and a searchable archive.

name: insights
title: Insights
description: Self-serve business intelligence with charts, dashboards, and visual data queries.

name: lending
title: Lending
description: Loan origination and management for NBFCs — applications, disbursement, and collections.

name: education
title: Education
description: Student lifecycle management — admissions, fees, attendance, grading, and scheduling.

name: non_profit
title: Non Profit
description: Grant management, donor tracking, membership, and volunteer coordination for NGOs.

name: agriculture
title: Agriculture
description: Farm management covering crops, soil analysis, water management, and disease tracking.

name: ecommerce_integrations
